svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="6层多级缓存与大促击穿" id="cache-incident"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-156" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1080" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE_USER" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="大促流量 + DDoS 攻击" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="360" x="360" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FLOW_IN" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="峰值 11W QPS (正常大促 10W + 攻击 1W)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="360" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="① CDN 边缘缓存
静态资源 + 兜底静态页" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="120" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1_DESC" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=10;" value="消化静态, 回源少" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="220" x="120" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="② WAF 流量清洗
页面缓存 + 安全策略" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="430" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2_DESC" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="⚠ 当时未常态化, 攻击未拦住" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="260" x="410" y="172" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="③ Nginx 反向代理
健康检查 + 故障摘除" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="740" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E12" edge="1" parent="1" source="L1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="L2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E23" edge="1" parent="1" source="L2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="L3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BYPASS" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="异常流量绕过业务缓存" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="220" x="430" y="232" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="④ SSR 本地 LRU
渲染好的 HTML, 降级兜底" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="120" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="⑤ Node BFF 接口聚合
减少回源" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="430" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="⑥ Redis 分布式缓存
热点数据 + 互斥锁" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="740" y="260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E45" edge="1" parent="1" source="L4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="L5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E56" edge="1" parent="1" source="L5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;" target="L6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E63" edge="1" parent="1" source="L6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;" target="BACKEND"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="HIT_WALL" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=10;" value="未命中 → 连接池打满" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="16" width="220" x="430" y="335" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BACKEND" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="后端服务 + 数据库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="360" x="360" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CRASH_DESC" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Socket 连接耗尽 → 服务响应缓慢" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="440" x="320" y="404" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="RECOVER" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#16a34a;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="恢复: WAF 识别 IP 频次/UA/请求模式 → 清洗拦截 + 限流 → Socket 逐步释放" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="680" x="200" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LESSON" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="多级缓存解决流量效率, 解决不了流量安全 —— WAF 清洗 + 限流从此常态化" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="760" x="160" y="494" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 420px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #dc2626;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#dc2626, #ff8a8a); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 大促流量 + DDoS 攻击
